visual_direction.concept: Sunlit trust-builder for a service business with technical credibility rather than SaaS dashboard aesthetics.
visual_direction.differentiation: Warm solar cues, real-world installation photography, and conversion surfaces that feel local and human.
visual_direction.media_direction: Use literal free-stock rooftop, commercial array, crew, and homeowner photography in designated media areas. Avoid synthetic dashboards or fake product mockups.

layout_structure.desktop: Wide editorial hero grids, proof bands between explanation blocks, and a persistent contact action rail on intent-heavy pages.
layout_structure.tablet: Two-column content where proof and conversion stay adjacent; communication controls remain visible without taking over the viewport.
layout_structure.mobile: Single-column stack with sticky bottom contact bar for call, WhatsApp, and chat. The lead form appears after proof and objection handling.

home: hero with quote CTA, WhatsApp CTA, and AI assistant entry
trust strip with warranty, financing, and response-time proof
feature grid explaining savings, installation, and monitoring
proof section with testimonials and before/after outcomes
FAQ focused on savings, roof suitability, and installation disruption
cta band with direct quote and call routes
residential: feature grid for bill reduction, backup readiness, and monitoring
workflow for survey, design, install, and support
proof section with household case studies
FAQ for timeline, roof type, and warranty questions
commercial: hero with operational savings and rollout clarity
feature grid for scale, staging, and reporting
workflow for audit, proposal, installation, and maintenance
financing: hero centered on affordability and payback
comparison section for purchase, financing, and incentive paths
workflow for qualification and next steps
FAQ for incentives, cash flow, and approvals
cta band pointing to estimator, WhatsApp, and advisor call
contact: hero with service promise and response window
trust strip with business hours and callback expectations
workflow clarifying quote and site-visit handling
cta band reinforcing direct action channels

theme_system.color_story: Deep solar green, warm amber CTA accents, bright mineral surfaces, and charcoal ink for trust-heavy readability.
theme_system.shape_language: Soft rounded cards and strong framed callouts for service trust.
theme_system.contrast_policy: Light-first experience with high-contrast dark proof and CTA bands where attention matters most.

motion_temperament.entry_behavior: Sections rise or fade with restrained stagger; hero imagery may use subtle parallax only when motion is allowed.
motion_temperament.interaction_behavior: Buttons and contact controls respond with fast elevation and color transitions; AI assistant dock slides in without bouncing.
motion_temperament.reduced_motion_fallback: Switch all reveals and dock transitions to instant or shadow-only state changes.

rules: Never bury call or WhatsApp behind the contact page only.
Keep at least one direct human channel visible above the fold on every lead route.
Use the AI assistant to qualify and hand off, not to trap users in a dead-end conversation.
Contact actions must remain readable and thumb-reachable on mobile.
